description: A 3D V-belt pulley standing upright along the Z-axis, featuring a V-groove outer profile, a central 12mm bore, and a 4mm wide keyway.
notes: To model this part: 1. Create a 2D profile in the XZ plane with the vertices: (6,0) -> (30,0) -> (30,5) -> (20,10) -> (30,15) -> (30,20) -> (6,20). Close the profile back to (6,0). 2. Revolve this profile 360 degrees around the Z-axis. 3. Cut a keyway slot on the +X side of the bore. The slot is a box spanning X from 6.0 to 8.5, Y from -2.0 to 2.0, and Z from 0.0 to 20.0.
